prediction.whyTheyWin: Washington Nationals are projected to win because Baltimore Orioles (37-42, 46.8%) have outplayed Washington Nationals (40-38, 51.3%) across the full season.; ESPN's model gives Baltimore Orioles a 49.3% chance and Washington Nationals a 50.7% chance.; Composite rating favors Washington Nationals: 0.474 vs 0.491 (ESPN + MLB.com + form).
